# Oslo Bike Tours

Oslo Bike Tours offers private, fully guided bike tours in Oslo, Norway.
Small groups (max 8 people), hotel pickup included, local guides Eivind and Haakon.

## Tours

- Oslo City Highlights — 18 km, 2 hours, road, easy. Aker Brygge, Opera House, Vigeland Park, Royal Palace. NOK 890/person.
- Bygdøy Peninsula — 28 km, 2.5 hours, road, medium. Fjord views, Viking Ship Museum, Folk Museum. NOK 1 050/person.
- Nordmarka Forest (Ring 4) — 45 km, 4 hours, gravel, medium. Pine and birch forest, Kikutstua cabin, Sognsvann lake. NOK 1 450/person.
- Epic Marka Endurance — 85 km, 6 hours, gravel, challenging. Deep Nordmarka wilderness, remote lakes, sustained climbs, rocky forest roads. Max 8 riders. NOK 2 150/person.
- Oslo Coffee Tour — 22 km, 3 hours, road, easy. Specialty coffee stops: Tim Wendelboe, Supreme Roastworks, Fuglen, Java. Coffee and pastry at each stop included. NOK 1 190/person.
- Oslo Architecture Tour — 30 km, 3 hours, road, easy. Nordic functionalism: Villa Stenersen (Arne Korsmo, 1939), Planetveien 12 (Korsmo, 1955), Havna Allé & Villa Dammann (1930–32), Skådalen School (Sverre Fehn, 1977). NOK 1 310/person.

## Key facts

- All tours are private — no strangers in your group
- Guide picks you up at your hotel in Oslo
- Tours tailored to your pace and preferences
- Optional café stops available on all tours
- Gravel bike and e-bike rentals available on request
- Bike not included in base price
- Helmet not included in base price
- Languages: English and Norwegian
- Group size: 1–8 people
- Based in Oslo, Norway

## Booking

- Book via web form at oslobiketours.no or by email
- No fixed departure times — tours run by appointment
- Enquiries answered within 24 hours

## Pricing summary

- Lowest price: NOK 890/person (Oslo City Highlights)
- Highest price: NOK 2 150/person (Epic Marka Endurance)
- All prices are per person
- Bike rental is an add-on, not included in base prices

## Physical requirements by tour

- Oslo City Highlights: Suitable for all fitness levels. Flat, paved roads. No hills.
- Bygdøy Peninsula: Suitable for all fitness levels. Gentle terrain. Paved roads.
- Nordmarka Forest Ring 4: Recreational fitness recommended. Gravel roads, moderate climbs.
- Epic Marka Endurance: Good fitness required. 85 km, gravel, long climbs. Full-day ride.
- Oslo Coffee Tour: Suitable for all fitness levels. Flat, paved roads. Urban route.
- Oslo Architecture Tour: Suitable for all fitness levels. Gentle hills. Paved roads.
